positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene bathed in magical twilight. The central subject is a stylized, bioluminescent fox curled beneath a massive, glowing moonlit oak tree. Include delicate floating lanterns, interconnected glowing roots forming natural pathways, and a diverse cluster of fantasy flora (mushrooms, ferns, glowing berries). The composition should be highly symmetrical and circular, perfect for a seamless print wrap. Use a deep emerald, sapphire blue, and warm gold color palette, with the lighting coming from the bioluminescence sources to create strong backlighting and ethereal glow effects. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with low-poly fantasy illustration, with clean, thick outlines and high contrast. Highly detailed, vector-like quality, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, out of focus, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, artifacts, noise, low detail, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy
